data.body: PASS 2 independent verification (read-only). Confirmed against code: process_snapshot restores only present compiled_state keys (src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py:515-519), so legacy SNAPSHOTs lacking managed_refs leave it unset (findings 3/7/11 well-grounded; PASS 1's T11 finding corroborates). The shipped parent CLEAR fires whenever Jira carries any parent and local is None (outbound_differ.py:400-414), corroborating the Why framing that it can clobber a human-set Jira parent (finding 1/2 citation accurate). Consumer child tickets wake-inn-parse and the drum-ruler-suit lineage exist, confirming the scope deferral. The reclamation-prune vs monotonic-union tension and the prune/gate ordering (findings 4/6/9) are genuine unaddressed design risks. The kind set {parent,blocks,depends_on,relates_to} is a subset of CANONICAL_RELATIONS (docs/event-schema.md:51), relevant to finding 5's extensibility concern.
